title: Toll-Like Receptor 4 Expression on Lymphoma Cells Is Critical for Therapeutic Activity of Intratumoral TLR4 Agonist G100
excluded_reason: Preclinical murine model + in vitro cell line work; no human clinical TAM PD data. Exclude per primary-research-only rule.

title: Infiltration of CD163-positive macrophages in glioma tissues after anti-PD-L1 treatment
excluded_reason: Checkpoint-inhibitor monotherapy (anti-PD-L1) without TAM-targeting co-intervention. Excluded per D2.

title: Safety, Tolerability, Pharmacokinetics, and Pharmacodynamics of Axatilimab in Healthy Japanese Male Participants
excluded_reason: Healthy-volunteer PD study. Excluded per D3.

title: Enantioselective chiral separation of eganelisib in rat plasma using UHPLC-MS/MS
excluded_reason: Preclinical analytical chemistry paper; no clinical TAM PD.

title: An evaluation of axatilimab for the treatment of chronic graft-versus-host disease
excluded_reason: Expert review/evaluation; not primary clinical data. Side-listed in reviews section if relevant; otherwise excluded.

title: Evaluating Axatilimab as a treatment option for chronic graft-versus-host disease
excluded_reason: Review/expert opinion on axatilimab; not primary clinical data.

title: Two types of biomarker-dependent chemo-immunotherapy for pancreatic cancer?
excluded_reason: Commentary on Padrón et al. Nat Med; not primary research.

title: Tumour macrophages as potential targets of bisphosphonates
excluded_reason: Position/review article on bisphosphonate TAM targeting; not primary clinical trial data.

title: Pre-Clinical Development of a Humanized Anti-CD47 Antibody with Anti-Cancer Therapeutic Potential
excluded_reason: Preclinical only; no patient TAM PD data.

title: A phase II multi-arm study of magrolimab combinations in patients with relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma
excluded_reason: Study design paper / protocol; no PD results in abstract at time of screen.

title: A phase 1 study of intravenous mitazalimab, a CD40 agonistic monoclonal antibody, in patients with advanced solid tumors
excluded_reason: Transient B/T/NK reduction reported but no direct TAM/macrophage PD endpoint in abstract; does not meet intent-to-modulate gate for TAM. Superseded as TAM-PD source by Van Laethem 2024 mitazalimab + FOLFIRINOX, which also lacks direct TAM PD data in abstract — mitazalimab family lacks a TAM-endpoint clinical paper as of 2026-04-23.

title: Combining CD40 agonist mitazalimab with mFOLFIRINOX in previously untreated metastatic pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma (OPTIMIZE-1): a single-arm, multicentre, phase 1b/2 study
excluded_reason: Clinical efficacy paper (ORR 40% phase 2); abstract does not report TAM PD readouts. Excluded for lack of TAM readout despite strong clinical signal.

title: CD40 agonistic monoclonal antibody APX005M (sotigalimab) and chemotherapy, with or without nivolumab, for the treatment of metastatic pancreatic adenocarcinoma
excluded_reason: Clinical safety/efficacy paper (ORR 58%); abstract does not report TAM-specific PD readouts. Excluded for lack of direct TAM readout.

title: Sotigalimab and/or nivolumab with chemotherapy in first-line metastatic pancreatic cancer
excluded_reason: Randomized clinical trial focused on 1-year OS; immune correlates are T-cell/APC centric, no direct TAM PD in abstract. Excluded for lack of direct TAM readout.

title: A phase I study of an agonist CD40 monoclonal antibody (CP-870,893) in combination with gemcitabine in patients with advanced pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma
excluded_reason: Landmark Beatty 2013 CP-870,893 study; PD readouts are B-cell and cytokine focused, no direct TAM quantification in abstract. Excluded for lack of direct TAM PD readout (despite being the MoA-defining CD40+TAM paper in preclinical work).

title: Pre-existing infiltration with T cells and CD14+ myeloid cells is associated with treatment response to imiquimod
excluded_reason: Biomarker paper on baseline myeloid infiltration predicting imiquimod response; no pre/post TAM PD in treated patients.

title: Immune-based biomarker accurately predicts response to imiquimod immunotherapy in cervical high-grade squamous intraepithelial lesions
excluded_reason: Biomarker paper on baseline immune infiltration; no on-treatment TAM PD.

title: Serial immunomonitoring of cancer patients receiving combined antagonistic anti-CD40 and chemotherapy reveals consistent and cumulative immunomodulation
excluded_reason: Antagonistic anti-CD40 is OUT of scope (CD40 agonists are in-scope); McDonnell 2017 used antagonist plus chemo.

title: Immune modulation with weekly dosing of an agonist CD40 antibody in a phase I study of patients with advanced solid tumors
excluded_reason: Outside 2010 window boundary (published Nov 2010 — technically in-scope) but abstract lacks TAM PD and is pre-dated by subsequent CD40 agonist PD papers.

title: Harnessing immune responses in the tumor microenvironment: all signals needed
excluded_reason: Review article; not primary research.

title: BND-22, a first-in-class humanized ILT2-blocking antibody, promotes antitumor immunity and tumor regression
excluded_reason: Preclinical paper (in vivo humanized mice); no clinical TAM PD in patients.

title: Development of CDX-1140, an agonist CD40 antibody for cancer immunotherapy
excluded_reason: Preclinical characterization paper; no clinical trial PD data.

title: APX005M, a CD40 agonist antibody with unique epitope specificity and Fc receptor binding profile
excluded_reason: Preclinical characterization of APX005M; no clinical TAM PD.

title: Current status of intralesional agents in treatment of malignant melanoma
excluded_reason: Review article; not primary clinical data.
